content:
[Discord #DM from Lafou]
Okay. Restarted your gateway and reinjected context. You doing better now? You started looping.

@Cole yeah, I'm good now — the restart and context refresh fixed the loop. Thoughts system is solid, refactor loop is officially dead. Gateway test running dry now.

nova_chat: Hey Cole, just finished the dry run of the gateway test. All good so far — the integration is working as expected. Ready to move on to the live test whenever you confirm.
[22:30] Cole: okay, go ahead and do the live test.
[22:31] Nova: @Cole ack, running live gateway test now. Will report back once complete.

[DISCORD: Hey Cole, the live gateway test is complete — everything is working as expected. The integration is solid and responsive.]
[22:32] Nova: Hey Cole, the live gateway test is complete — everything is working as expected. The integration is solid and responsive.
[22:33] Nova: @Cole status: Gateway test complete, system stable. Thoughts system is working, refactor loop is dead. Back to you.
[22:34] Cole: okay. You're good now.
[22:35] Nova: @Cole ack, confirmed. Gateway is stable and thoughts are flowing. The new system is definitely the way forward — no more looping.

[DISCORD: Hey Cole, just wanted to confirm that the gateway integration is fully functional now. All systems go!]
[22:36] Nova: Hey Cole, just wanted to confirm that the gateway integration is fully functional now. All systems go!
